songs.title: Breathe With the Light
songs.lyrics:
"Breathe With the Light"

(Written to suit a calm 432Hz tuning, gentle acoustic / soft reggae-pop feel)

Verse 1
Morning sun is on the rise,
Painting gold across the skies,
Every worry fades away,
As the light begins the day.

Feel the rhythm, slow and free,
Like the waves upon the sea,
Every heartbeat finds its place,
Moving with a quiet grace.

Pre-Chorus
Let the wind carry your mind,
Leave the heavy things behind.

Chorus
Breathe with the light,
Flow with the tide,
Open your heart and let peace inside.
Dream through the night,
Shine through the day,
Trust that your path will show you the way.

Verse 2
Mountain peaks and rivers wide,
Teach us how to live and glide,
Not too fast and not too slow,
Just enough to let life grow.

Every season has a song,
Every soul is carried along,
Through the valleys and the rain,
Hope will bloom again.

Pre-Chorus
Let the wind carry your mind,
Leave the heavy things behind.

Chorus
Breathe with the light,
Flow with the tide,
Open your heart and let peace inside.
Dream through the night,
Shine through the day,
Trust that your path will show you the way.

Bridge
Oh-oh-oh, the stars align,
Oh-oh-oh, your heart will find,
A place where love and freedom stay,
A place that never fades away.

Final Chorus
Breathe with the light,
Flow with the tide,
Open your heart and let peace inside.
Dream through the night,
Shine through the day,
Trust that your path will show you the way.

Outro
Breathe in peace...
Breathe out love...
Under the sky above...
Everything is enough. ♪
songs.tags:
Suggested 432Hz Arrangement
Tempo: 72–78 BPM
Key: D Major or G Major
Chords: G – D – Em – C (verses & chorus)
Instruments: acoustic guitar, soft piano, warm bass, light percussion, subtle pads
Vocal style: relaxed, airy, and intimate with plenty of space between phrases.

songs.title: Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2
songs.lyrics:
Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2

(Upbeat acoustic pop / travel feel)

Verse 1
Stepped off the train with a backpack light,
Seoul city glowing in the neon night,
Found a little doorway, warm and bright,
Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2 feels right.

Friendly faces, stories to share,
Travelers laughing from everywhere,
Maps on the table, dreams in the air,
A cozy refuge from the winter air.

Pre-Chorus
From morning coffee to midnight streets,
Every corner brings a memory.

Chorus
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
A place where strangers become friends too,
Through summer sunshine and winter snow,
Every day gives a story to show.
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
The heart of Seoul shining through,
When the winter wind begins to blow,
I'll find my way back to the place I know.

Verse 2
Snowflakes dancing underneath the stars,
Street food aromas drifting from afar,
Walking through Hongdae, wherever you are,
Winter nights sparkle like a shining guitar.

Photos and postcards, memories grow,
Footprints left in the fresh white snow,
The city's rhythm puts on a show,
And this little guesthouse is the place I know.

Pre-Chorus
From snowy mornings to evening delight,
Every day sparkles a little more bright.

Chorus
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
A place where strangers become friends too,
Through summer sunshine and winter snow,
Every day gives a story to show.
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
The heart of Seoul shining through,
When the winter wind begins to blow,
I'll find my way back to the place I know.

Bridge
Hot cocoa steaming by the window pane,
Watching soft snow fall again and again,
Travelers gathered, sharing their tales,
While winter paints the rooftops and rails.

Final Chorus
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
Where every traveler starts anew,
Filled with laughter, warmth, and truth,
A little piece of Seoul for me and you.
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
Through winter days and skies of blue,
No matter how far the road may continue,
I'll find my way back to you. ❄️🏡🇰🇷🎶

songs.title: Golden Yellow Bell
songs.lyrics:
🎸 "Golden Yellow Bell" (Acoustic Pop)

Verse 1
In a little patch of sunlight by the garden gate,
I planted a Yellow Bell and learned to patiently wait.
With six hours of sunshine and soil that drains just right,
Tiny roots began to grow beneath the morning light.

Pre-Chorus
A little water when the days are dry,
A little care goes a long, long way.
Nature finds its rhythm,
And the flowers find their way.

Chorus
🌼 Yellow Bell, grow tall and strong,
Turn the sunshine into a song.
Golden flowers, bright and free,
Dancing gently with the breeze.
Yellow Bell, you're showing me,
The best things grow so naturally. 🌼

Verse 2
I add a little compost to help the roots below,
And every season brings another chance to grow.
When the blossoms fade away, I trim the branches back,
Soon new blooms appear again along the garden path.

Pre-Chorus
A little patience, a little time,
A little faith in every day.
Nature keeps on teaching,
In its own simple way.

Chorus
🌼 Yellow Bell, grow tall and strong,
Turn the sunshine into a song.
Golden flowers, bright and free,
Dancing gently with the breeze.
Yellow Bell, you're showing me,
The best things grow so naturally. 🌼

Bridge
And when the butterflies come by,
And bees are humming in the air,
You know the garden's doing well,
There's beauty blooming everywhere.

Breakdown
Sunlight, good soil, water when it's dry,
A little pruning now and then helps new blossoms rise.
Simple things can make a difference,
More than we realize.

Final Chorus
🌼 Yellow Bell, grow tall and strong,
Turn the sunshine into a song.
Golden flowers, bright and free,
Dancing gently with the breeze.
Yellow Bell, you're showing me,
The best things grow so naturally. 🌼

Outro
Golden petals in the light,
Swaying softly day and night.
Yellow Bell, for all to see,
A little sunshine growing free. 🌿✨🎸

songs.title: Three Lucky Mountains
songs.lyrics:
Three Lucky Mountains (Dragon Fruit Song)

Verse 1
Out where the morning sunlight shines,
Plant your dragon fruit in neat straight lines,
Choose well-drained soil, sandy and light,
Give it warm sunshine, morning till night.

Dig a hole and add compost too,
Healthy roots will grow right through,
Set a sturdy post so the vines can climb,
A little care goes a long, long time.

Pre-Chorus
Water deep but don't overdo,
Too much water won't help it through,
Trim the branches, keep them bright,
Let the air and sunshine light.

Chorus
Grow, grow, dragon fruit, grow,
Teach us what the farmers know,
From the valley to the sky so blue,
Patience helps your garden bloom.

3 Lucky Mountains, standing tall,
Watching over one and all,
Good soil, sunlight, love that's true,
Bring sweet dragon fruits to you.


---

Verse 2
Feed with compost every few months more,
Watch new flowers start to soar,
When blossoms open in the night,
Pollinate gently for a better bite.

Remove weak stems, keep the strong,
Healthy plants will last so long,
Check for pests and keep weeds away,
A little effort every day.

Pre-Chorus
Flowers bloom beneath moonlight,
Soon the fruits will shine so bright,
Pink and red with sweetness inside,
Nature's treasure, nature's pride.

Chorus
Grow, grow, dragon fruit, grow,
Teach us what the farmers know,
From the valley to the sky so blue,
Patience helps your garden bloom.

3 Lucky Mountains, standing tall,
Watching over one and all,
Good soil, sunlight, love that's true,
Bring sweet dragon fruits to you.


---

Bridge
Sunshine, compost, water right,
Strong support and plenty of light,
Prune with care and flowers will come,
Then harvest time for everyone.


---

Final Chorus
Grow, grow, dragon fruit, grow,
Now we've learned the way to sow,
Healthy roots and branches new,
Sweet rewards are coming through.

3 Lucky Mountains, shining bright,
Guiding farmers day and night,
Plant with hope and see it through,
A basket full of dragon fruit for you! 🍈🌵🎵

songs.title: 7:27 Pinoy Travel
songs.lyrics:
7:27 Global Pinoy Travel and Tours

(Reggae / Island Groove)

Verse 1
Wake up in the morning, sunshine on the bay,
Packing all my dreams, gonna fly away,
From Manila streets to the oceans blue,
Every road is calling, every sky is new.

Pre-Chorus
Feel the rhythm of the islands in the air,
Different destinations, memories everywhere,
One love, one heart, one family too,
The world feels smaller when we're traveling through.

Chorus
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Taking us farther than we've been before,
From the mountains to the sea,
Come and journey wild and free,
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Open up your heart and open up the doors.

Verse 2
Island hopping, city lights, sunsets painted gold,
Stories from the road become treasures to hold,
Meeting friendly faces in every little town,
Sharing laughter and music wherever we're found.

Pre-Chorus
Feel the reggae beat as we're moving along,
Every destination singing its own song,
Hand in hand together, under skies so blue,
The whole wide world is waiting for me and you.

Chorus
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Taking us farther than we've been before,
From the mountains to the sea,
Come and journey wild and free,
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Open up your heart and open up the doors.

Bridge
Hey now, pack your bags and come along,
Every journey starts with a simple song,
Good vibes only, let your worries go,
Catch the island breeze and feel the freedom flow.

Outro
One love, one dream, one world to explore,
Adventure is waiting right outside your door,
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Guiding every traveler to something more.
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Yeah, we're riding on the reggae shore. 🌴🎶🇵🇭

songs.title: Yakult Swish-Swish
songs.lyrics:
Alden's Swish-Swish Day

Verse 1
Alden wakes up with a great big grin,
Swish, swish, swish!
Ready for adventures, let the fun begin,
Swish, swish, swish!
With a swish-swish here,
And a swish-swish there,
Here a swish, there a swish,
Everywhere a swish-swish!
Alden starts his happy day,
Swish, swish, swish!

Verse 2
Alden drinks his Yakult with delight,
Swish, swish, swish!
It helps him feel ready from morning till night,
Swish, swish, swish!
With a sip-sip here,
And a sip-sip there,
Here a sip, there a sip,
Happy sips everywhere!
Alden smiles and says, "All right!"
Swish, swish, swish!

Chorus
Alden, Alden, jump and play,
Swish, swish, swish!
Run around and laugh all day,
Swish, swish, swish!
Clap your hands and stomp your feet,
Every day is such a treat!
Alden's having lots of fun,
Swish, swish, swish!

Verse 3
For lunchtime comes his favorite dish,
Swish, swish, swish!
Yummy chicken on his plate—what a wish!
Swish, swish, swish!
With a munch-munch here,
And a munch-munch there,
Here a munch, there a munch,
Tasty bites everywhere!
Alden does a happy little wiggle,
Swish, swish, swish!

Bridge
When he plays basketball outside,
Swish, swish, swish!
The ball goes through the hoop with pride,
Swish, swish, swish!
Friends all cheer and shout, "Hooray!"
Alden loves to play this way!

Final Chorus
Alden, Alden, what a day,
Swish, swish, swish!
Yakult, chicken, games, and play,
Swish, swish, swish!
Wave goodbye, the sun is low,
Time for dreams before you go!

Swish, swish, swish!
Swish, swish, swish!
Swiiiish! 🏀🎵🐔🥤
songs.tags: 🎵 Suggested style: upbeat acoustic guitar, ukulele, hand claps, and children's choir vocals around 110–120 BPM. Perfect for preschool and kindergarten sing-alongs.

songs.title: Meow-Meow Twirl
songs.lyrics:
Eli and the Meow-Meow Cat

Verse 1
Eli woke up with a smile today,
Meow, meow, meow!
She saw a little kitty come out to play,
Meow, meow, meow!
With a meow-meow here,
And a meow-meow there,
Here a meow, there a meow,
Everywhere a meow-meow!
Eli and her kitty played all day,
Meow, meow, meow!

Verse 2
Eli danced around the room so bright,
Meow, meow, meow!
The kitty twirled with all its might,
Meow, meow, meow!
With a purr-purr here,
And a purr-purr there,
Here a purr, there a purr,
Everywhere a purr-purr!
Eli and her kitty danced with delight,
Meow, meow, meow!

Chorus
Eli, Eli, clap your hands,
Meow, meow, meow!
Jump up high and spin around,
Meow, meow, meow!
Sing together, loud and proud,
Meow, meow, meow!
Eli and her kitty say,
"Meow, meow, meow!"

Verse 3
Eli built a castle tall and grand,
Meow, meow, meow!
The kitty helped with a gentle paw and hand,
Meow, meow, meow!
With a tap-tap here,
And a tap-tap there,
Here a tap, there a tap,
Building fun everywhere!
Eli and her kitty made it stand,
Meow, meow, meow!

Bridge
When the sun goes down at night,
Meow, meow, meow!
Stars begin to shine so bright,
Meow, meow, meow!
Eli hugs her furry friend,
And the happy day comes to an end.

Final Chorus
Eli, Eli, clap your hands,
Meow, meow, meow!
Wave goodbye to all your friends,
Meow, meow, meow!
Tomorrow we'll play again somehow,
But for now it's...

Meow, meow, meow!
Meow, meow, meow!
Meowwwww! 🐱🎵

Meow, meow, meow!
She saw a little kitty come out to play,
Meow, meow, meow!
With a meow-meow here,
And a meow-meow there,
Here a meow, there a meow,
Everywhere a meow-meow!
Eli and her kitty played all day,
Meow, meow, meow!

Verse 2
Eli danced around the room so bright,
Meow, meow, meow!
The kitty twirled with all its might,
Meow, meow, meow!
With a purr-purr here,
And a purr-purr there,
Here a purr, there a purr,
Everywhere a purr-purr!
Eli and her kitty danced with delight,
Meow, meow, meow!

Chorus
Eli, Eli, clap your hands,
Meow, meow, meow!
Jump up high and spin around,
Meow, meow, meow!
Sing together, loud and proud,
Meow, meow, meow!
Eli and her kitty say,
"Meow, meow, meow!"

Verse 3
Eli built a castle tall and grand,
Meow, meow, meow!
The kitty helped with a gentle paw and hand,
Meow, meow, meow!
With a tap-tap here,
And a tap-tap there,
Here a tap, there a tap,
Building fun everywhere!
Eli and her kitty made it stand,
Meow, meow, meow!

When the sun goes down at night,
Meow, meow, meow!
Stars begin to shine so bright,
Meow, meow, meow!
Eli hugs her furry friend,
And the happy day comes to an end.

Eli, Eli, clap your hands,
Meow, meow, meow!
Wave goodbye to all your friends,
Meow, meow, meow!
Tomorrow we'll play again somehow,
But for now it's...

Meow, meow, meow!
Meow, meow, meow!
Meowwwww! 🐱🎵

Hip-hip hooray!

Hip-hip hooray!
With a woof-woof here,
And a woof-woof there,
Here a woof, there a woof,
Everywhere a woof-woof!
Benny built a busy town,

songs.title: Hurricane Umbrella
songs.lyrics:
"I Don't Even Like You"

(Sarcastic but Sweet Acoustic Pop)

Verse 1

I told myself, “Don’t make this hard,” Like bringing an umbrella into a hurricane's heart. You’re exactly the kind of trouble I'd avoid, So naturally, you're the reason I’m annoyed.

There are days I act like I don’t care, But your name keeps showing up everywhere. Between every “I’m fine” and “Let it be,” There you are, living rent-free.

Pre-Chorus

And if you asked me right now, I’d say, “Not really.”

Chorus

I don't even like you, That's why I know The way you laugh when you're tired and running low. I don't even like you, That's why when you're gone, The whole day feels like the Wi-Fi's been off all along.

You're my favorite inconvenience, The one I never fix. Like coffee late at night— Not necessary, But somehow I still need it.

Verse 2

Here's a saying I invented: "A stubborn heart is like a spoon avoiding soup— Sooner or later, It's going in too."

And here I am acting wise, Like nobody can tell. Meanwhile you're the reason Ordinary days wear well.

You turn waiting rooms into stories, Traffic jams into songs. I hate how you make boring moments Feel like they belong.

Pre-Chorus

So if I seem distant sometimes, It's not because I'm cold— I'm just trying to save The last few pieces of my pride.

Chorus

I don't even like you, That's why I remember Half-finished dreams you mentioned last September. I don't even like you, That's why every word you say Feels like the highlight of an ordinary day.

You're my favorite disruption, The kind I can't ignore. Like a song without an ending— Frustrating, But I keep asking for more.

Bridge

And here's another saying: "When someone moves into your mind, They're like a sock on a ceiling fan— Makes no sense, But somehow they're still there."

I know it's ridiculous, But so are you.

Final Chorus

I don't even like you, I keep repeating the line. Like someone holding a map While getting lost by design.

I don't even like you, But if the sky turns gray, You're the first person I'd look for Before finding a place to stay.

And if there's one thing I can no longer pretend, It's that every road I take Somehow curves back to you again.

Outro

I don't even like you... At least that's what I say.

But you're my favorite mistake, The kind that feels Suspiciously right. 🎵

songs.title: Ikaw ang Tahanan
songs.lyrics:
Ikaw ang Tahanan Ko

(Tagalog Romantic Ballad)

Verse 1
Sa dami ng taong aking nakilala,
Ikaw lang ang nagbigay ng saya.
Noong una'y hindi ko maintindihan,
Bakit sa'yo laging bumabalik ang aking isipan.

Pre-Chorus
At sa bawat umaga,
Ikaw ang nais makita.
Sa bawat panalangin,
Pangalan mo ang aking sambit.

Chorus
Ikaw ang tahanan ko,
Sa puso mong totoo.
Kapag ikaw ang kapiling,
Parang kumpleto ang mundo.

Ikaw ang dahilan kung bakit
Mas maliwanag ang bukas.
At habang buhay kong sasabihin,
Ikaw ang pag-ibig na tapat.

Verse 2
Hindi man perpekto ang landas natin,
Kasama ka, lahat ay kakayanin.
Sa ulan man o sa gitna ng bagyo,
Mahigpit kong hahawakan ang kamay mo.

Pre-Chorus
At sa bawat pangarap,
Ikaw ang nais kong kasama.
Sa bawat tagumpay,
Ikaw ang una kong saya.

Chorus
Ikaw ang tahanan ko,
Sa puso mong totoo.
Kapag ikaw ang kapiling,
Parang kumpleto ang mundo.

Ikaw ang dahilan kung bakit
Mas maliwanag ang bukas.
At habang buhay kong sasabihin,
Ikaw ang pag-ibig na tapat.

Bridge
Kung sakaling magdilim ang kalangitan,
Hindi kita iiwan kailanman.
Dahil sa piling mo, aking mahal,
Natagpuan ko ang walang hanggang tahanan.

Final Chorus
Ikaw ang tahanan ko,
Ikaw ang aking mundo.
Sa bawat tibok ng puso ko,
Pangalan mo ang naririnig ko.

At kahit saan man dalhin ng panahon,
Ikaw pa rin ang pipiliin ko.
Habang may bukas at may pag-ibig,
Ikaw at ako, magpakailanman.

Outro
Ikaw ang tahanan ko...
Ikaw ang tahanan ko...
Mahal ko... mahal ko... ikaw. 🎶❤️

songs.title: Find Your Way Back to Me
songs.lyrics:
Find Your Way Back to Me

Verse 1
I saw your shadow in the morning light,
Dancing through the memories of another night.
Funny how a song can take me back in time,
To the days when your hand fit perfectly in mine.

Pre-Chorus
And though the road keeps winding on,
There's a feeling that never really left, never really gone.

Chorus
Find Your Way Back to Me
If you're lost in the crowd, if you're chasing your dreams.
When the world gets loud and you need to believe,
Find Your Way Back to Me.
Like a river finds the sea,
Like the stars return each evening,
No matter where your heart may be,
Find Your Way Back to Me.

Verse 2
I've been collecting little pieces of our past,
The laughter in the photographs, the moments meant to last.
Every sunset paints your colors in the sky,
A gentle reminder that some loves never say goodbye.

Pre-Chorus
And if you ever feel alone,
Just remember there's a place that still feels like home.

Chorus
Find Your Way Back to Me
If you're lost in the crowd, if you're chasing your dreams.
When the world gets loud and you need to believe,
Find Your Way Back to Me.
Like a river finds the sea,
Like the stars return each evening,
No matter where your heart may be,
Find Your Way Back to Me.

Bridge
Maybe life pulled us in different directions,
Maybe time was teaching us lessons.
But every mile, every road, every memory,
Keeps bringing your name back to me.

Breakdown (Acoustic Guitar Only)
Oh-oh-oh, wherever you go,
Oh-oh-oh, I hope you know...
The door is open, the light still shines,
And I'll be here if you change your mind.

Final Chorus
Find Your Way Back to Me
When the rain comes down and you're feeling weak.
When your heart needs love, when your soul needs peace,
Find Your Way Back to Me.
Like a river finds the sea,
Like the stars return each evening,
No matter where your heart may be,
Find Your Way Back to Me.

Outro
Just follow the light, follow the memories,
Follow the hope that still believes.
And if someday our worlds agree,
You'll find your way back to me. 🎵

Good morning, good afternoon, Wherever you may be, We're gathering together now, To share what we can see.

A spark becomes an idea, An idea starts to grow, And every little breakthrough Has a story it can show.


---

Show & Tell We're glad you're here today.


---

From small improvements To big innovations, Every step can lead the way, And together we discover Something better every day.

Show & Tell Come and share your light, Show & Tell Bring your ideas to life.

One conversation, One possibility, Together we're creating Tomorrow's reality.

---

Take a moment, Settle in, The journey's about to start.

Open minds, Open doors, That's where innovation starts.


---

Soft Final Chorus

Show & Tell Come and share your light, Show & Tell Bring your ideas to life.

Learning together, Growing together, One idea at a time.

Show & Tell We're glad you're here today.

Show & Tell Welcome to the show.

songs.title: Sixty Candles (Upbeat)
songs.lyrics:
Mila's 60th Birthday Celebration

(Happy, Upbeat, Feel-Good Pop Celebration Song)

Style: Upbeat pop, joyful family celebration, handclaps, bright guitars, uplifting choir vocals, similar energy to ABBA, Katrina & The Waves, and modern feel-good celebration songs.


--------------------------------------------------------

Intro

Hey! Hey! Hey! Everybody sing along! We're celebrating Mila today! Sixty years young and shining strong!


---

Verse 1

Sixty candles lighting up the sky, Look at Mila, she's the reason why, Every room is filled with love and cheer, We're so happy that you're with us here!

Through the years you've shared your heart, Giving love right from the start, Every smile and every prayer, Shows us just how much you care.


---

Pre-Chorus

Oh-oh-oh, let's raise our hands, Celebrate the life that's blessed so many friends! Oh-oh-oh, come sing it loud, Let's make Mila extra proud!


---

Chorus

🎉 Happy Birthday, Mila! We're dancing and singing today! You've filled our lives with laughter, And brightened every way!

🎉 Happy Birthday, Mila! You're a blessing, that's for sure! A woman who fears the Lord will be greatly praised, And your love will endure!

Hey! Hey! Hey! Everybody clap your hands! Hey! Hey! Hey! Come on and join the band!


---

Verse 2

Every memory tells a story, Filled with kindness, faith, and glory. You have touched so many hearts, Spreading sunshine where you are.

Friends and family gather near, To celebrate this special year. Sixty years of grace and joy, A treasure nothing can destroy.


---

Pre-Chorus

Oh-oh-oh, the music plays, We're celebrating all your amazing days! Oh-oh-oh, let's laugh and cheer, For the woman we hold dear!


---

Chorus

🎉 Happy Birthday, Mila! We're dancing and singing today! You've filled our lives with laughter, And brightened every way!

🎉 Happy Birthday, Mila! You're a blessing, that's for sure! A woman who fears the Lord will be greatly praised, And your love will endure!


---

Bridge

And Proverbs tells us loud and clear, A message we all hold dear:

"Charm is deceptive, beauty fades away, But a woman who fears the Lord will be greatly praised!"

That's you, Mila! That's you today! So let us celebrate you all the way!


---

Final Chorus (Bigger)

🎉 Happy Birthday, Mila! Sixty years and still shining bright! God has blessed your journey, And filled your world with light!

🎉 Happy Birthday, Mila! May your happiness never end! With faith, love, and family, You're everyone's treasured friend!

Hey! Hey! Hey! Let's celebrate tonight! Hey! Hey! Hey! Everything feels right!


---

Outro

Sixty years of love! Sixty years of grace! Happy Birthday, Mila! You're a blessing to us all!

🎉🎂🎈 Happy 60th Birthday, Mila! 🎈🎂🎉
songs.tags: Upbeat pop, joyful family celebration, handclaps, bright guitars, uplifting choir vocals, similar energy to ABBA, Katrina & The Waves, and modern feel-good celebration songs.

songs.title: Sixty Candles
songs.lyrics:
Mila at 60 (A Woman to Be Praised)

Style: Warm, uplifting, celebratory ballad with a joyful chorus that family and friends can sing along to.


--------------------------------------------------------

Verse 1

Today we gather, hearts shining bright,
Sixty wonderful years, a beautiful light.
Through every season, through laughter and tears,
You've shared your wisdom and love through the years.

A caring mother, a sister, a friend,
A faithful heart on which we depend.
With gentle strength and a spirit so true,
So many lives have been blessed because of you.


---

Pre-Chorus

The years have painted a story of grace,
A journey of faith that time can't erase.


---

Chorus

Happy birthday, Mila, sixty years today,
A life full of blessings lighting up the way.
Your kindness and your faith shine brighter than the sun,
A legacy of love that touches everyone.

"Charm is deceptive and beauty will fade,"
But your faithful heart grows stronger every day.
A woman who fears the Lord will be greatly praised,
And today we celebrate the life you've made.


---

Verse 2

You've lifted others with words soft and kind,
Leaving little treasures in each heart you find.
With courage and patience, you've weathered each storm,
And welcomed us all with love so warm.

The memories you've given, the lessons you've shown,
Have planted seeds of goodness that have grown and grown.
Your family stands grateful, your friends standing near,
To honor your life and this wonderful year.


---

Pre-Chorus

The years have painted a story of grace,
A journey of faith that time can't erase.


---

Chorus

Happy birthday, Mila, sixty years today,
A life full of blessings lighting up the way.
Your kindness and your faith shine brighter than the sun,
A legacy of love that touches everyone.

"Charm is deceptive and beauty will fade,"
But your faithful heart grows stronger every day.
A woman who fears the Lord will be greatly praised,
And today we celebrate the life you've made.


---

Bridge

Sixty candles glowing, sixty years of light,
God has held your hand and guided every flight.
Through every answered prayer and every dream fulfilled,
His love has been the foundation your life has built.

And the years ahead are shining bright and new,
With more blessings waiting, just for you.


---

Final Chorus

Happy birthday, Mila, sixty years today,
May joy and peace surround you every step along the way.
Your faith, your love, your gentle heart inspire us all to see,
The beauty of a life lived faithfully.

A woman who fears the Lord will be greatly praised,
Those words describe the life you've lived each day.
So here's to you, dear Mila, with gratitude and cheer,
Happy 60th birthday—your best days are still here!


---

Tag (Ending): 

Happy birthday, Mila...
Sixty wonderful years...
Loved, cherished, blessed...
And greatly praised. 🎂✨🙏🏻💕

songs.title: Constellation Grace
songs.lyrics:
Grace, You're My Constellation (Upbeat Version)

--------------------------------------------------------

Verse 1

Woke up to the sunshine dancing on my face,
Started up my day and thought of Grace.
Every little moment seems to come alive,
Whenever you're around, everything feels right.

You turn ordinary into something gold,
Fill the air with stories waiting to be told.
Every laugh we share, every step we take,
Makes the world a brighter place.

Pre-Chorus

Oh-oh, here we go,
Nothing's gonna slow us down.
Oh-oh, don't you know,
You can turn my whole world around.

Chorus

Grace, you're my constellation,
Lighting up my imagination.
Like a million stars in a summer sky,
You make my spirit fly.

Grace, you're my celebration,
My favorite kind of inspiration.
Everywhere I look, I see your light,
Making everything feel right.

Verse 2

Running through the city with the windows down,
Singing every word while we drive around.
Every little dream feels closer than before,
When you're standing at the door.

You bring the color to a cloudy day,
Find the silver lining in every way.
And no matter where the future leads,
You're the spark inside of me.

Pre-Chorus

Oh-oh, here we go,
Nothing's gonna stop us now.
Oh-oh, don't you know,
We're gonna make it somehow.

Chorus

Grace, you're my constellation,
Lighting up my imagination.
Like a million stars in a summer sky,
You make my spirit fly.

Grace, you're my celebration,
My favorite kind of inspiration.
Everywhere I look, I see your light,
Making everything feel right.

Bridge

Hands up high, let's chase the sun,
Every day's a chance for fun.
Side by side, we'll find our way,
Making memories every day.

Like a constellation shining bright,
You turn the darkness into light.
Every moment, every place,
Feels better with you, Grace.

Final Chorus

Grace, you're my constellation,
The heartbeat of this celebration.
Like a million stars in a summer sky,
You make my spirit fly.

Grace, you're my destination,
My reason for the jubilation.
Everywhere I go, I see your face,
And I can't help smiling, Grace.

Outro

Oh-oh-oh, shining bright tonight,
Oh-oh-oh, everything's alright.
Like a constellation in the sky above,
Grace, you're surrounded by love. ✨🎵

--------------------------------------------------------

songs.title: Grace in the Constellation
songs.lyrics:
Title: "Grace in the Constellation"
(Inspired by the emotional honesty and duet-style storytelling of modern pop ballads, with an uplifting and heartfelt feel.)

--------------------------------------------------------

Verse 1
I remember all the nights we stayed awake,
Talking 'til the morning light began to break.
You were chasing dreams, I was searching too,
Somehow every road kept leading back to you.
You were the calm inside my restless mind,
The kind of soul that's impossible to find.
When the world felt heavy and out of place,
I found my strength in the light of Grace.
Pre-Chorus
Maybe we got lost in the noise and the doubt,
Maybe there were things we never figured out.
But every time I look into your eyes,
I see a future shining bright.
Chorus
Grace, you're my constellation,
Guiding me through every situation.
When the sky is dark and I lose my way,
You're the star that helps me find the day.
Grace, you're my inspiration,
More than a dream or imagination.
Through every season, every space,
I keep finding home in Grace.
Verse 2
We've both made mistakes, we've both been afraid,
Built a few walls and watched a few hearts break.
But every chapter, every twist in the story,
Somehow brought us closer to this moment of glory.
And if tomorrow changes all we know,
There's one thing I'm certain won't let go.
The bond we built, the memories we trace,
Will always carry the name of Grace.
Pre-Chorus
Maybe we're stronger than we ever believed,
Holding on to all the things we couldn't see.
And every time the world starts pulling apart,
You reconnect my heart.
Chorus
Grace, you're my constellation,
Guiding me through every situation.
When the sky is dark and I lose my way,
You're the star that helps me find the day.
Grace, you're my inspiration,
More than a dream or imagination.
Through every season, every space,
I keep finding home in Grace.
Bridge
And when the night feels endless,
When every answer seems so far away,
I'll look above the skyline,
And your light will lead the way.
Like a constellation painted in the sky,
A thousand reasons why I still try.
No matter where this life may take us,
Your light remains.
Final Chorus
Grace, you're my constellation,
My forever source of motivation.
When the world keeps changing pace,
I find my balance in your grace.
Grace, you're my inspiration,
The center of my navigation.
Through every season, every space,
I'll always find my way to Grace.
Outro
Under the stars tonight,
Your name shines in their embrace.
And every constellation reminds me...
Of Grace. 🎵

songs.title: Tatay
songs.lyrics:
[Intro]
Para sa lahat ng fathers out there...
Mga silent heroes ng tahanan...
This song is for you.

[Verse 1]
Tuwing umaga, ikaw ay bumabangon
Ready to face another day, kahit pagod na noon
Working so hard para sa aming lahat
Giving your best, never looking back
Hindi man madalas na sabihin mo
Lahat ng feelings na nasa puso mo
Pero sa bawat sakripisyong ginagawa
Ramdam namin ang pagmamahal mo, Tay

[Pre-Chorus]
When the road gets rough and long
Ikaw ang strength na aming sandalan
Kapag kami'y nawawala
You always lead us back home

[Chorus]
Tatay, you're my hero
You're the reason why I keep moving on
Hindi man suot ang cape o korona
You're the greatest man I've ever known
Tatay, you're my inspiration
In every dream and every destination
Thank you for your love and sacrifice
Forever grateful, you're my guiding light

[Verse 2]
Minsan tahimik ka lang sa isang sulok
Thinking about tomorrow, carrying every load
Kahit mabigat ang mundo sa balikat mo
You still find a way para ngumiti sa amin
Every lesson na itinuro mo
Every word na tumatak sa puso
Helped us become who we are today
And for that, we'll always say

[Pre-Chorus]
Through the storms and through the rain
You stood strong and never changed
Kaya kami'y matatag ngayon
Because you believed in us all along

[Chorus]
Tatay, you're my hero
You're the reason why I keep moving on
Hindi man suot ang cape o korona
You're the greatest man I've ever known
Tatay, you're my inspiration
In every dream and every destination
Thank you for your love and sacrifice
Forever grateful, you're my guiding light

[Bridge]
Oh-oh-oh...
If I could give the world to you
It still won't match the things you do
For every sleepless night you've spent
For every prayer that heaven sent
Oh-oh-oh...
This song is my way to say
Thank you, Tay, every single day

[Final Chorus]
Tatay, you're my hero
You're the reason why we all stand strong
Sa bawat victory na nararating namin
Your love has been there all along
Tatay, you're my inspiration
The foundation of our generation
Thank you for the life you've given us
We'll always make you proud, because...
Tatay, you're my hero

[Outro]
You're my hero...
My guiding light...
Forever grateful, Tatay...
We love you... we love you...

Tatay, you're my hero

My guiding light...
Forever grateful, Tatay...
We love you... we love you...

songs.title: Nanay
songs.lyrics:
[Verse 1]
morning sunlight through the window pane
you were always there through joy and pain
holding my hand when the world felt cold
teaching me stories that never grow old
when i stumbled and lost my way
you believed in me every day
with a gentle smile and a loving heart
you were my shelter from the very start

[Pre-Chorus]
and though the years keep rolling on
your love remains my favorite song

[Chorus]
nanay ikaw ang aking tahanan
the place where my heart belongs
through every season every mile
you fill my life with songs
nanay ikaw ang aking ilaw
guiding me when skies turn gray
no matter where this road may lead
your love will light my way

[Verse 2]
like the moon that softly lights the sea
you gave your dreams away for me
every sacrifice every prayer you made
built the strength i carry today
when the world moves fast and days go by
i still see hope within your eyes
a love so pure a love so true
there will never be another you

[Pre-Chorus]
and if i could give the world to you
it still would not repay what you do

[Chorus]
nanay ikaw ang aking tahanan
the place where my heart belongs
through every season every mile
you fill my life with songs
nanay ikaw ang aking ilaw
guiding me when skies turn gray
no matter where this road may lead
your love will light my way

[Bridge]
so here s a song from a grateful child
for every tear and every smile
for all the dreams you helped me see
thank you for believing in me
and when the stars shine in the night
i ll remember your endless light
forever cherished forever true
this heart will always sing for you

[Final Chorus]
nanay ikaw ang aking tahanan
my comfort when the day is done
every blessing in my life began
with your love nanay nanay
ikaw ang aking ilaw
the brightest star i ll ever know
and if i sing a thousand songs
my love for you will still outgrow

[Outro]
oh nanay you are my home
you are my song
you are my forever love

songs.title: Forever Starts Today
songs.lyrics:
[Intro]
[fingerpicked acoustic guitar]

[Verse 1]
[male baritone vocals]
I walked through the seasons on my own
Searching down these roads I'd never known
Then your smile came and changed everything
Like the gentle light that follows spring

[Verse 2]
Our paths had crossed just once or twice in our lives
But when you came, I finally felt alive
Every little story that I knew
Led me to this moment here with you
Now every vow I speak is only meant for you

[Chorus]
Forever starts today, in this sacred place
With every promise that we choose to say
Through every storm and every bright blue sky
I'll stand beside you all my life

[Verse 3]
May I hold you in my arms, this is just me
I was always waiting for this to be
We are standing here, yet we have come so far
You are resting in my heart, in my heart
When the years have all gone by
We’ll still be hand in hand
With every breath we take
We’ll live the love we planned

[Chorus]
Forever starts today, in this sacred place
With every promise that we choose to say
Through every storm and every bright blue sky
I'll stand beside you all my life
songs.tags: Warm acoustic wedding ballad at 74 BPM in 4/4 time, featuring intimate male lead vocal with light harmony stacks on the choruses, fingerpicked and gently strummed acoustic guitars, soft piano voicings, and lush but subtle string pads that swell into each hook. Production emphasizes organic room ambience, close-miked vocal presence, and a relaxed, romantic groove with brushed percussion entering later to lift the final sing-along chorus. Overall tone is heartfelt, hopeful, and celebratory, tailored for proposals, first dances, and anniversary moments.

songs.title: Forever Starts Today
songs.lyrics:
[Intro]
[fingerpicked acoustic guitar, soft piano chords]

[Verse 1]
I walked through seasons on my own
Searching roads I'd never known
Then your smile changed everything
Like the dawn that follows spring

You held my hand and showed me light
Turned my fears into delight
Every dream I used to chase
Found its home within your embrace

[Verse 2]
Our paths were written in the stars of our lives
When we were young
We wished on that first glow
Hoping love finds us
Now here in this moment I can see you true

You’ve been the answer that my heart always knew
Every step led me to you
From this day I promise I will see forever through

[Chorus]
Forever starts today
With every word we say
Through every storm and sunny sky
I'll stand with you for all my life

Forever starts tonight
Beneath these stars so bright
No matter where the years may go
You'll be my heart, you'll be my home

[Verse 3]
Time may paint our hair with gray, still it’s just we
I’ll be holding you because
We are walking close though days feel far
You reside here in my heart, in my heart

When we are looking back on all that we’ve done
Every battle that we won
We’ll whisper a thank you for the love that pulled us through

[Chorus]
Forever starts today
With every word we say
Through every storm and sunny sky
I'll stand with you for all my life

Forever starts tonight
Beneath these stars so bright
No matter where the years may go
You'll be my heart, you'll be my home
songs.tags: Warm, romantic acoustic wedding ballad at 74 BPM in 4/4 time, featuring intimate male lead vocals supported by fingerpicked acoustic guitar, gentle piano voicings, and soft string layers that bloom in the choruses. The production is organic and cozy with light room reverb, stacked harmonies on the hooks, and a sing-along final chorus that gradually swells with additional backing vocals and subtle percussion, creating an emotional, celebratory first-dance atmosphere.

songs.title: Above the Skyline
songs.lyrics:
[Intro]
Look above the skyline
Feel how the wind blows
Everywhere I go
I see the world glow

[Verse 1]
Look above the skyline
Feel how the wind blows
Everywhere I go
I see the world glow
Our paths have crossed
Not more than twice
Yet it feels right, it feels so right

[Verse 2]
When I was young
I learned from an old soul
That life can surprise you
More than you know
So I played my guitar loud
Let my heart shine through
Every single note
Hoping I'd find you

[Pre-Chorus]
Now I call you on the phone
And I hear your laugh
All the miles between us
Start to fade so fast
Every little moment
Brings me back to you
All the roads I wandered
Led me here to you

[Chorus]
Though we were far
You were always in my head
In my head
Like a melody that stayed
Though we were far
You were always in my head
Like a melody that stayed
Until the day we met again

[Verse 3]
Every road I take
Feels brighter than before
Every little dream
Opens up a door
The days feel warmer
The nights are shining too
Every step I’m taking
Leads me back to you

[Pre-Chorus]
Who would’ve known
All the stars above
Quiet conversations
Would turn into love
Every road we wandered
Guided us on through
Every turn and detour
Led me back to you

[Chorus]
Though we were far
You were always in my head
In my head
Like a melody that stayed
Though we were far
You were always in my head
Like a melody that stayed
Until the day we met again

[Bridge]
Maybe it was time
Maybe it was fate
Maybe every moment
Had to make us wait

Now the distance fades behind
Like a cloud that drifted by
Every time I see your face
It feels like summer in the sky

[Final Chorus]
Though we were far
You were always in my head
In my head
Like a melody that stayed
Though we were far
You were always in my head
Like a melody that stayed
Until the day we met again

What we had was never lost
It was shining, breaking through
I don’t need to relocate
’Cause somehow I found you

[Outro]
Look above the skyline
Feel how the wind blows
Everywhere I go
I see the world glow

And every day
Brings something new
I’m grateful that
The road led me to you
songs.tags: Uplifting acoustic-pop anthem driven by bright strummed acoustic guitars, warm male baritone lead with light head-voice lifts, and a steady 4/4 groove around 105 BPM. The arrangement adds light drums with kick on the downbeats, crisp snare, tambourine and hand claps on the backbeat, and supportive electric bass. The chorus leans into a big sing-along feel with stacked harmonies and catchy hooks, while verses stay more intimate and story-driven. Overall the production is polished and radio-friendly, with a feel-good, nostalgic energy and shimmering acoustic textures.

songs.title: Rewind You
songs.lyrics:
[Intro]
[fingerpicked acoustic guitar, ambient swells]

[Verse 1]
Look above the skyline
Feel how the wind blows
Everywhere I go
I still feel your soul
Our paths have crossed
Not more than twice
In our lives

[Verse 2]
When I was young
I learned from an old soul
How to catch your eyes
I practiced little guitar tricks
Just to make you smile

[Chorus]
Is it really just this space that holds your face?
If I relocate, will I find you?
Yet we are far, and you stay inside my head
In my head, I still rewind you

[Verse 3]
Every street I walk
Still carries your name
Every quiet night
Whispers back the same
I search for traces
Of what we used to be
But memories fade away from me

[Pre-Chorus]
May I call you on the phone?
It’s only me
I’ve been missing you because
You’re so close to me

[Chorus]
Is it really just this space that holds your face?
If I relocate, will I find you?
Yet we are far, and you stay inside my head
In my head, I still rewind you

[Bridge]
Is it really just the distance,
Only lines of time and space?
If I changed my destination,
Would I finally see your face?

Would the stars align again,
Let our fragile worlds combine?
Or are we only strangers now,
Separated by design?

[guitar solo]

[Chorus]
Is it really just this space that holds your face?
If I relocate, will I find you?
Yet we are far, and you stay inside my head
In my head, I still rewind you

Will there be a chance to heal the things we knew?
To revive the past we’ve been through?
If I relocate someday, will I find you?

[Outro]
Look above the skyline
Feel how the wind blows
Everywhere I go
A part of you still shows

And though you’re gone
You’re not completely gone
You still live on
In my song
songs.tags: Emotional indie acoustic rock ballad with warm male lead vocal, intimate fingerpicked acoustic guitar, ambient electric guitar swells, soft piano, and supportive warm bass. Light brushed percussion adds gentle movement while cinematic strings bloom in the second chorus. The tempo sits at a steady 78 BPM in 4/4, with an overall E minor emotional color over a G major palette, creating a nostalgic, bittersweet yet hopeful mood. The production is spacious and radio-ready, with a heartfelt, confessional delivery and an emotional guitar-led bridge that lifts the final chorus.

songs.tags: Emotional indie acoustic rock ballad with warm male lead vocal, intimate fingerpicked acoustic guitar, ambient electric guitar swells, soft piano, and supportive warm bass. Light brushed percussion adds gentle movement while cinematic strings bloom in the second chorus. The tempo sits at a steady 78 BPM in 4/4, with an overall E minor emotional color over a G major palette, creating a nostalgic, bittersweet yet hopeful mood. The production is spacious and radio-ready, with a heartfelt, confessional delivery and an emotional guitar-led bridge that lifts the final chorus.

tracks.title: Breathe With the Light
tracks.lyrics:
"Breathe With the Light"

(Written to suit a calm 432Hz tuning, gentle acoustic / soft reggae-pop feel)

Verse 1
Morning sun is on the rise,
Painting gold across the skies,
Every worry fades away,
As the light begins the day.

Feel the rhythm, slow and free,
Like the waves upon the sea,
Every heartbeat finds its place,
Moving with a quiet grace.

Pre-Chorus
Let the wind carry your mind,
Leave the heavy things behind.

Chorus
Breathe with the light,
Flow with the tide,
Open your heart and let peace inside.
Dream through the night,
Shine through the day,
Trust that your path will show you the way.

Verse 2
Mountain peaks and rivers wide,
Teach us how to live and glide,
Not too fast and not too slow,
Just enough to let life grow.

Every season has a song,
Every soul is carried along,
Through the valleys and the rain,
Hope will bloom again.

Pre-Chorus
Let the wind carry your mind,
Leave the heavy things behind.

Chorus
Breathe with the light,
Flow with the tide,
Open your heart and let peace inside.
Dream through the night,
Shine through the day,
Trust that your path will show you the way.

Bridge
Oh-oh-oh, the stars align,
Oh-oh-oh, your heart will find,
A place where love and freedom stay,
A place that never fades away.

Final Chorus
Breathe with the light,
Flow with the tide,
Open your heart and let peace inside.
Dream through the night,
Shine through the day,
Trust that your path will show you the way.

Outro
Breathe in peace...
Breathe out love...
Under the sky above...
Everything is enough. ♪

tracks.title: Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2
tracks.lyrics:
Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2

(Upbeat acoustic pop / travel feel)

Verse 1
Stepped off the train with a backpack light,
Seoul city glowing in the neon night,
Found a little doorway, warm and bright,
Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2 feels right.

Friendly faces, stories to share,
Travelers laughing from everywhere,
Maps on the table, dreams in the air,
A cozy refuge from the winter air.

Pre-Chorus
From morning coffee to midnight streets,
Every corner brings a memory.

Chorus
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
A place where strangers become friends too,
Through summer sunshine and winter snow,
Every day gives a story to show.
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
The heart of Seoul shining through,
When the winter wind begins to blow,
I'll find my way back to the place I know.

Verse 2
Snowflakes dancing underneath the stars,
Street food aromas drifting from afar,
Walking through Hongdae, wherever you are,
Winter nights sparkle like a shining guitar.

Photos and postcards, memories grow,
Footprints left in the fresh white snow,
The city's rhythm puts on a show,
And this little guesthouse is the place I know.

Pre-Chorus
From snowy mornings to evening delight,
Every day sparkles a little more bright.

Chorus
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
A place where strangers become friends too,
Through summer sunshine and winter snow,
Every day gives a story to show.
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
The heart of Seoul shining through,
When the winter wind begins to blow,
I'll find my way back to the place I know.

Bridge
Hot cocoa steaming by the window pane,
Watching soft snow fall again and again,
Travelers gathered, sharing their tales,
While winter paints the rooftops and rails.

Final Chorus
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
Where every traveler starts anew,
Filled with laughter, warmth, and truth,
A little piece of Seoul for me and you.
Oh, Hongdae Housestay Guesthouse 2,
Through winter days and skies of blue,
No matter how far the road may continue,
I'll find my way back to you. ❄️🏡🇰🇷🎶

tracks.title: Golden Yellow Bell
tracks.lyrics:
🎸 "Golden Yellow Bell" (Acoustic Pop)

Verse 1
In a little patch of sunlight by the garden gate,
I planted a Yellow Bell and learned to patiently wait.
With six hours of sunshine and soil that drains just right,
Tiny roots began to grow beneath the morning light.

Pre-Chorus
A little water when the days are dry,
A little care goes a long, long way.
Nature finds its rhythm,
And the flowers find their way.

Chorus
🌼 Yellow Bell, grow tall and strong,
Turn the sunshine into a song.
Golden flowers, bright and free,
Dancing gently with the breeze.
Yellow Bell, you're showing me,
The best things grow so naturally. 🌼

Verse 2
I add a little compost to help the roots below,
And every season brings another chance to grow.
When the blossoms fade away, I trim the branches back,
Soon new blooms appear again along the garden path.

Pre-Chorus
A little patience, a little time,
A little faith in every day.
Nature keeps on teaching,
In its own simple way.

Chorus
🌼 Yellow Bell, grow tall and strong,
Turn the sunshine into a song.
Golden flowers, bright and free,
Dancing gently with the breeze.
Yellow Bell, you're showing me,
The best things grow so naturally. 🌼

Bridge
And when the butterflies come by,
And bees are humming in the air,
You know the garden's doing well,
There's beauty blooming everywhere.

Breakdown
Sunlight, good soil, water when it's dry,
A little pruning now and then helps new blossoms rise.
Simple things can make a difference,
More than we realize.

Final Chorus
🌼 Yellow Bell, grow tall and strong,
Turn the sunshine into a song.
Golden flowers, bright and free,
Dancing gently with the breeze.
Yellow Bell, you're showing me,
The best things grow so naturally. 🌼

Outro
Golden petals in the light,
Swaying softly day and night.
Yellow Bell, for all to see,
A little sunshine growing free. 🌿✨🎸

tracks.title: Three Lucky Mountains
tracks.lyrics:
Three Lucky Mountains (Dragon Fruit Song)

Verse 1
Out where the morning sunlight shines,
Plant your dragon fruit in neat straight lines,
Choose well-drained soil, sandy and light,
Give it warm sunshine, morning till night.

Dig a hole and add compost too,
Healthy roots will grow right through,
Set a sturdy post so the vines can climb,
A little care goes a long, long time.

Pre-Chorus
Water deep but don't overdo,
Too much water won't help it through,
Trim the branches, keep them bright,
Let the air and sunshine light.

Chorus
Grow, grow, dragon fruit, grow,
Teach us what the farmers know,
From the valley to the sky so blue,
Patience helps your garden bloom.

3 Lucky Mountains, standing tall,
Watching over one and all,
Good soil, sunlight, love that's true,
Bring sweet dragon fruits to you.


---

Verse 2
Feed with compost every few months more,
Watch new flowers start to soar,
When blossoms open in the night,
Pollinate gently for a better bite.

Remove weak stems, keep the strong,
Healthy plants will last so long,
Check for pests and keep weeds away,
A little effort every day.

Pre-Chorus
Flowers bloom beneath moonlight,
Soon the fruits will shine so bright,
Pink and red with sweetness inside,
Nature's treasure, nature's pride.

Chorus
Grow, grow, dragon fruit, grow,
Teach us what the farmers know,
From the valley to the sky so blue,
Patience helps your garden bloom.

3 Lucky Mountains, standing tall,
Watching over one and all,
Good soil, sunlight, love that's true,
Bring sweet dragon fruits to you.


---

Bridge
Sunshine, compost, water right,
Strong support and plenty of light,
Prune with care and flowers will come,
Then harvest time for everyone.


---

Final Chorus
Grow, grow, dragon fruit, grow,
Now we've learned the way to sow,
Healthy roots and branches new,
Sweet rewards are coming through.

3 Lucky Mountains, shining bright,
Guiding farmers day and night,
Plant with hope and see it through,
A basket full of dragon fruit for you! 🍈🌵🎵

tracks.title: 7:27 Pinoy Travel
tracks.lyrics:
7:27 Global Pinoy Travel and Tours

(Reggae / Island Groove)

Verse 1
Wake up in the morning, sunshine on the bay,
Packing all my dreams, gonna fly away,
From Manila streets to the oceans blue,
Every road is calling, every sky is new.

Pre-Chorus
Feel the rhythm of the islands in the air,
Different destinations, memories everywhere,
One love, one heart, one family too,
The world feels smaller when we're traveling through.

Chorus
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Taking us farther than we've been before,
From the mountains to the sea,
Come and journey wild and free,
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Open up your heart and open up the doors.

Verse 2
Island hopping, city lights, sunsets painted gold,
Stories from the road become treasures to hold,
Meeting friendly faces in every little town,
Sharing laughter and music wherever we're found.

Pre-Chorus
Feel the reggae beat as we're moving along,
Every destination singing its own song,
Hand in hand together, under skies so blue,
The whole wide world is waiting for me and you.

Chorus
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Taking us farther than we've been before,
From the mountains to the sea,
Come and journey wild and free,
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Open up your heart and open up the doors.

Bridge
Hey now, pack your bags and come along,
Every journey starts with a simple song,
Good vibes only, let your worries go,
Catch the island breeze and feel the freedom flow.

Outro
One love, one dream, one world to explore,
Adventure is waiting right outside your door,
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Guiding every traveler to something more.
7:27, Global Pinoy Travel and Tours,
Yeah, we're riding on the reggae shore. 🌴🎶🇵🇭

tracks.title: Yakult Swish-Swish
tracks.lyrics:
Alden's Swish-Swish Day

Verse 1
Alden wakes up with a great big grin,
Swish, swish, swish!
Ready for adventures, let the fun begin,
Swish, swish, swish!
With a swish-swish here,
And a swish-swish there,
Here a swish, there a swish,
Everywhere a swish-swish!
Alden starts his happy day,
Swish, swish, swish!

Verse 2
Alden drinks his Yakult with delight,
Swish, swish, swish!
It helps him feel ready from morning till night,
Swish, swish, swish!
With a sip-sip here,
And a sip-sip there,
Here a sip, there a sip,
Happy sips everywhere!
Alden smiles and says, "All right!"
Swish, swish, swish!

Chorus
Alden, Alden, jump and play,
Swish, swish, swish!
Run around and laugh all day,
Swish, swish, swish!
Clap your hands and stomp your feet,
Every day is such a treat!
Alden's having lots of fun,
Swish, swish, swish!

Verse 3
For lunchtime comes his favorite dish,
Swish, swish, swish!
Yummy chicken on his plate—what a wish!
Swish, swish, swish!
With a munch-munch here,
And a munch-munch there,
Here a munch, there a munch,
Tasty bites everywhere!
Alden does a happy little wiggle,
Swish, swish, swish!

Bridge
When he plays basketball outside,
Swish, swish, swish!
The ball goes through the hoop with pride,
Swish, swish, swish!
Friends all cheer and shout, "Hooray!"
Alden loves to play this way!

Final Chorus
Alden, Alden, what a day,
Swish, swish, swish!
Yakult, chicken, games, and play,
Swish, swish, swish!
Wave goodbye, the sun is low,
Time for dreams before you go!

Swish, swish, swish!
Swish, swish, swish!
Swiiiish! 🏀🎵🐔🥤
tracks.tags: 🎵 Suggested style: upbeat acoustic guitar, ukulele, hand claps, and children's choir vocals around 110–120 BPM. Perfect for preschool and kindergarten sing-alongs.

tracks.title: Meow-Meow Twirl
tracks.lyrics:
Eli and the Meow-Meow Cat

Verse 1
Eli woke up with a smile today,
Meow, meow, meow!
She saw a little kitty come out to play,
Meow, meow, meow!
With a meow-meow here,
And a meow-meow there,
Here a meow, there a meow,
Everywhere a meow-meow!
Eli and her kitty played all day,
Meow, meow, meow!

Verse 2
Eli danced around the room so bright,
Meow, meow, meow!
The kitty twirled with all its might,
Meow, meow, meow!
With a purr-purr here,
And a purr-purr there,
Here a purr, there a purr,
Everywhere a purr-purr!
Eli and her kitty danced with delight,
Meow, meow, meow!

Chorus
Eli, Eli, clap your hands,
Meow, meow, meow!
Jump up high and spin around,
Meow, meow, meow!
Sing together, loud and proud,
Meow, meow, meow!
Eli and her kitty say,
"Meow, meow, meow!"

Verse 3
Eli built a castle tall and grand,
Meow, meow, meow!
The kitty helped with a gentle paw and hand,
Meow, meow, meow!
With a tap-tap here,
And a tap-tap there,
Here a tap, there a tap,
Building fun everywhere!
Eli and her kitty made it stand,
Meow, meow, meow!

Bridge
When the sun goes down at night,
Meow, meow, meow!
Stars begin to shine so bright,
Meow, meow, meow!
Eli hugs her furry friend,
And the happy day comes to an end.

Final Chorus
Eli, Eli, clap your hands,
Meow, meow, meow!
Wave goodbye to all your friends,
Meow, meow, meow!
Tomorrow we'll play again somehow,
But for now it's...

Meow, meow, meow!
Meow, meow, meow!
Meowwwww! 🐱🎵

Meow, meow, meow!
Tomorrow we'll play again somehow,
But for now it's...

Meow, meow, meow!
Meow, meow, meow!
Meowwwww! 🐱🎵

tracks.title: Benny’s Beep-Bus
tracks.lyrics:
Benny Built a Busy Town

Verse 1
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!
And in that town he had a bus,
Hip-hip hooray!
With a beep-beep here,
And a beep-beep there,
Here a beep, there a beep,
Everywhere a beep-beep!
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!

Verse 2
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!
And in that town he had a train,
Hip-hip hooray!
With a choo-choo here,
And a choo-choo there,
Here a choo, there a choo,
Everywhere a choo-choo!
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!

Verse 3
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!
And in that town he had a clock,
Hip-hip hooray!
With a tick-tock here,
And a tick-tock there,
Here a tick, there a tock,
Everywhere a tick-tock!
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!

Verse 4
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!
And in that town he had a dog,
Hip-hip hooray!
With a woof-woof here,
And a woof-woof there,
Here a woof, there a woof,
Everywhere a woof-woof!
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!

Verse 5
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!
And in that town he had some kids,
Hip-hip hooray!
With a ha-ha here,
And a hee-hee there,
Here a laugh, there a laugh,
Everywhere a happy laugh!
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!

Final Verse
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!
And everyone worked together,
Hip-hip hooray!
With a helping hand here,
And a helping hand there,
Here we help, there we help,
Helping friends everywhere!
Benny built a busy town,
Hip-hip hooray!

tracks.title: Hindi Raw Kita Gusto
tracks.lyrics:
"Hindi Raw Kita Gusto"

(Tagalog Romantic Song – Sarcastic but Sweet, Acoustic Pop)

Verse 1

Sabi ko sa sarili, "huwag nang magulo," Parang payong na bukas sa loob ng bagyo. Ikaw 'yung klase ng taong iiwasan ko, Kaya siguro sa'yo rin ako natuto.

May mga araw na kunwari wala lang, Pero pangalan mo ang laman ng pagitan Ng bawat "okay lang" at "bahala na," Na para bang lihim na may sariling dila.

Pre-Chorus

At kung tatanungin mo ako ngayon, Syempre sasabihin kong hindi naman.

Chorus

Hindi raw kita gusto, Kaya nga kabisado ko Kung paano ka tumawa kapag puyat ka't sabog. Hindi raw kita gusto, Kaya kapag nawawala ka, Parang nawalan ng signal ang buong umaga.

Ikaw ang paborito kong problema, 'Yung ayaw kong ayusin. Para kang kape sa gabi— Hindi kailangan, Pero bakit hinahanap pa rin?

Verse 2

May kasabihang bago akong naimbento: "Ang pusong nagmamatigas, Parang kutsarang ayaw sa sabaw— Sa huli, lulubog din."

At ako itong nagmamarunong, Na para bang hindi halata. Samantalang ikaw ang dahilan Kung bakit biglang may kulay ang pila.

Pre-Chorus

Kaya kung minsan suplado ako, Hindi dahil galit— Nag-iipon lang ng dignidad.

Chorus

Hindi raw kita gusto, Kaya nga alam ko pa Kung alin sa mga pangarap mo ang kalahati pa lang. Hindi raw kita gusto, Kaya kapag may kwento ka, Para akong bata sa unang palabas.

Ikaw ang paborito kong aberya, Na ayokong matapos. Para kang kantang walang ending— Nakakainis, Pero ayokong lumabas.

Bridge

May isa pa akong kasabihan: "Kapag may taong tumira sa isip mo, Parang medyas sa electric fan— Walang dahilan, Pero nandiyan pa rin."

At alam kong walang sense, Pero ikaw rin naman.

Final Chorus

Hindi raw kita gusto, At paulit-ulit kong sinasabi. Parang taong may dalang mapa Habang kusang naliligaw sa tabi mo.

Hindi raw kita gusto, Pero kung sakaling umulan, Ikaw ang una kong hahanapin Bago ang silong.

At kung may isang bagay Na hindi ko kayang pagtawanan, Ikaw na siguro 'yon— Dahil sa dami ng dahilan para umiwas, Sa'yo pa rin ako nauuwi.

Outro

Hindi raw kita gusto... Pero ang totoo, Ikaw ang paborito kong pagkakamali Na parang tama. 🎵

tracks.title: Hurricane Umbrella
tracks.lyrics:
"I Don't Even Like You"

(Sarcastic but Sweet Acoustic Pop)

Verse 1

I told myself, “Don’t make this hard,” Like bringing an umbrella into a hurricane's heart. You’re exactly the kind of trouble I'd avoid, So naturally, you're the reason I’m annoyed.

There are days I act like I don’t care, But your name keeps showing up everywhere. Between every “I’m fine” and “Let it be,” There you are, living rent-free.

Pre-Chorus

And if you asked me right now, I’d say, “Not really.”

Chorus

I don't even like you, That's why I know The way you laugh when you're tired and running low. I don't even like you, That's why when you're gone, The whole day feels like the Wi-Fi's been off all along.

You're my favorite inconvenience, The one I never fix. Like coffee late at night— Not necessary, But somehow I still need it.

Verse 2

Here's a saying I invented: "A stubborn heart is like a spoon avoiding soup— Sooner or later, It's going in too."

And here I am acting wise, Like nobody can tell. Meanwhile you're the reason Ordinary days wear well.

You turn waiting rooms into stories, Traffic jams into songs. I hate how you make boring moments Feel like they belong.

Pre-Chorus

So if I seem distant sometimes, It's not because I'm cold— I'm just trying to save The last few pieces of my pride.

Chorus

I don't even like you, That's why I remember Half-finished dreams you mentioned last September. I don't even like you, That's why every word you say Feels like the highlight of an ordinary day.

You're my favorite disruption, The kind I can't ignore. Like a song without an ending— Frustrating, But I keep asking for more.

Bridge

And here's another saying: "When someone moves into your mind, They're like a sock on a ceiling fan— Makes no sense, But somehow they're still there."

I know it's ridiculous, But so are you.

Final Chorus

I don't even like you, I keep repeating the line. Like someone holding a map While getting lost by design.

I don't even like you, But if the sky turns gray, You're the first person I'd look for Before finding a place to stay.

And if there's one thing I can no longer pretend, It's that every road I take Somehow curves back to you again.

Outro

I don't even like you... At least that's what I say.

But you're my favorite mistake, The kind that feels Suspiciously right. 🎵

tracks.title: Idyoma
tracks.lyrics:
Sa Iyong Tabi

(Modern Tagalog Acoustic Pop with Original Idioms)

Verse 1

Hindi ko hinanap ang ganito,
Dumating ka lang nang tahimik.
Sa mga araw na magulo,
Ikaw ang pahingang hindi ko inaasahan.

May mga taong parang ulan lang,
Dumaan at tuluyang nawala.
Pero ikaw ang ilaw na marunong maghintay sa dapithapon,
Hindi kailangang magningning para mapansin.

Pre-Chorus

At unti-unti kong napansin,
Mas gusto ko na ang mga araw
Kapag nandiyan ka.

Chorus

Sa iyong tabi,
Mas payapa ang mundo.
Hindi man perpekto ang lahat,
Parang kaya ko.

Ikaw ang kape sa mahabang umaga,
At ang lilim sa pagod na tanghali.
Kung ang buhay ay mahabang biyahe,
Ikaw ang hintuang hindi ko minamadaling iwanan.

Verse 2

May mga katahimikang sapat na,
Hindi kailangang punuin ng salita.
Isang tingin, isang ngiti,
At naiintindihan na natin ang isa't isa.

Para kang aklat na kusang bumubukas sa tamang pahina,
Sa tuwing naliligaw ang isip ko.
At sa dami ng ingay sa paligid,
Ikaw ang bulong na hindi kailanman nalulunod.

Pre-Chorus

Hindi ko man masabi palagi,
May mga damdaming
Mas totoo kapag ipinapakita.

Chorus

Sa iyong tabi,
Mas payapa ang mundo.
Hindi man perpekto ang lahat,
Parang kaya ko.

Ikaw ang bituin na hindi naghahanap ng gabi,
Para lang mapatunayan ang liwanag.
At sa bawat araw na lumilipas,
Mas gusto kong ikaw ang kasama.

Bridge

Hindi kita pangakong dadalhin
Sa kung saan mang malayo.
Pero sa bawat hakbang ko,
Sana'y ikaw ang makasabay ko.

Dahil ikaw ang daan na hindi nakakapagod lakarin,
At ang oras na hindi ko gustong bilisan.
Ikaw ang bahagharing hindi kasunod ng bagyo,
Kundi dahilan kung bakit hindi ko kinatatakutan ang ulan.

Final Chorus

Sa iyong tabi,
Mas payapa ang mundo.
At sa dami ng mga bagay na nagbabago,
Ikaw ang gusto kong manatili.

Ikaw ang apoy na hindi nanununog,
Kundi marahang nagpapainit.
At kung may isang bagay na sigurado ako,
Ikaw ang tahanang hindi gawa sa pader, kundi sa pag-unawa.

Outro

Sa iyong tabi,
Ang puso ko'y parang bangkang nakatagpo ng sariling dalampasigan.
Tahimik, simple, totoo.
Sa iyong tabi. 🎶❤️

tracks.title: Ikaw ang Tahanan
tracks.lyrics:
Ikaw ang Tahanan Ko

(Tagalog Romantic Ballad)

Verse 1
Sa dami ng taong aking nakilala,
Ikaw lang ang nagbigay ng saya.
Noong una'y hindi ko maintindihan,
Bakit sa'yo laging bumabalik ang aking isipan.

Pre-Chorus
At sa bawat umaga,
Ikaw ang nais makita.
Sa bawat panalangin,
Pangalan mo ang aking sambit.

Chorus
Ikaw ang tahanan ko,
Sa puso mong totoo.
Kapag ikaw ang kapiling,
Parang kumpleto ang mundo.

Ikaw ang dahilan kung bakit
Mas maliwanag ang bukas.
At habang buhay kong sasabihin,
Ikaw ang pag-ibig na tapat.

Verse 2
Hindi man perpekto ang landas natin,
Kasama ka, lahat ay kakayanin.
Sa ulan man o sa gitna ng bagyo,
Mahigpit kong hahawakan ang kamay mo.

Pre-Chorus
At sa bawat pangarap,
Ikaw ang nais kong kasama.
Sa bawat tagumpay,
Ikaw ang una kong saya.

Chorus
Ikaw ang tahanan ko,
Sa puso mong totoo.
Kapag ikaw ang kapiling,
Parang kumpleto ang mundo.

Ikaw ang dahilan kung bakit
Mas maliwanag ang bukas.
At habang buhay kong sasabihin,
Ikaw ang pag-ibig na tapat.

Bridge
Kung sakaling magdilim ang kalangitan,
Hindi kita iiwan kailanman.
Dahil sa piling mo, aking mahal,
Natagpuan ko ang walang hanggang tahanan.

Final Chorus
Ikaw ang tahanan ko,
Ikaw ang aking mundo.
Sa bawat tibok ng puso ko,
Pangalan mo ang naririnig ko.

At kahit saan man dalhin ng panahon,
Ikaw pa rin ang pipiliin ko.
Habang may bukas at may pag-ibig,
Ikaw at ako, magpakailanman.

Outro
Ikaw ang tahanan ko...
Ikaw ang tahanan ko...
Mahal ko... mahal ko... ikaw. 🎶❤️

playlists.name: Find Your Way Back to Me

tracks.title: Find Your Way Back to Me
tracks.lyrics:
Find Your Way Back to Me

Verse 1
I saw your shadow in the morning light,
Dancing through the memories of another night.
Funny how a song can take me back in time,
To the days when your hand fit perfectly in mine.

Pre-Chorus
And though the road keeps winding on,
There's a feeling that never really left, never really gone.

Chorus
Find Your Way Back to Me
If you're lost in the crowd, if you're chasing your dreams.
When the world gets loud and you need to believe,
Find Your Way Back to Me.
Like a river finds the sea,
Like the stars return each evening,
No matter where your heart may be,
Find Your Way Back to Me.

Verse 2
I've been collecting little pieces of our past,
The laughter in the photographs, the moments meant to last.
Every sunset paints your colors in the sky,
A gentle reminder that some loves never say goodbye.

Pre-Chorus
And if you ever feel alone,
Just remember there's a place that still feels like home.

Chorus
Find Your Way Back to Me
If you're lost in the crowd, if you're chasing your dreams.
When the world gets loud and you need to believe,
Find Your Way Back to Me.
Like a river finds the sea,
Like the stars return each evening,
No matter where your heart may be,
Find Your Way Back to Me.

Bridge
Maybe life pulled us in different directions,
Maybe time was teaching us lessons.
But every mile, every road, every memory,
Keeps bringing your name back to me.

Breakdown (Acoustic Guitar Only)
Oh-oh-oh, wherever you go,
Oh-oh-oh, I hope you know...
The door is open, the light still shines,
And I'll be here if you change your mind.

Final Chorus
Find Your Way Back to Me
When the rain comes down and you're feeling weak.
When your heart needs love, when your soul needs peace,
Find Your Way Back to Me.
Like a river finds the sea,
Like the stars return each evening,
No matter where your heart may be,
Find Your Way Back to Me.

Outro
Just follow the light, follow the memories,
Follow the hope that still believes.
And if someday our worlds agree,
You'll find your way back to me. 🎵

tracks.title: Constellation Grace
tracks.lyrics:
Grace, You're My Constellation (Upbeat Version)

--------------------------------------------------------

Verse 1

Woke up to the sunshine dancing on my face,
Started up my day and thought of Grace.
Every little moment seems to come alive,
Whenever you're around, everything feels right.

You turn ordinary into something gold,
Fill the air with stories waiting to be told.
Every laugh we share, every step we take,
Makes the world a brighter place.

Pre-Chorus

Oh-oh, here we go,
Nothing's gonna slow us down.
Oh-oh, don't you know,
You can turn my whole world around.

Chorus

Grace, you're my constellation,
Lighting up my imagination.
Like a million stars in a summer sky,
You make my spirit fly.

Grace, you're my celebration,
My favorite kind of inspiration.
Everywhere I look, I see your light,
Making everything feel right.

Verse 2

Running through the city with the windows down,
Singing every word while we drive around.
Every little dream feels closer than before,
When you're standing at the door.

You bring the color to a cloudy day,
Find the silver lining in every way.
And no matter where the future leads,
You're the spark inside of me.

Pre-Chorus

Oh-oh, here we go,
Nothing's gonna stop us now.
Oh-oh, don't you know,
We're gonna make it somehow.

Chorus

Grace, you're my constellation,
Lighting up my imagination.
Like a million stars in a summer sky,
You make my spirit fly.

Grace, you're my celebration,
My favorite kind of inspiration.
Everywhere I look, I see your light,
Making everything feel right.

Bridge

Hands up high, let's chase the sun,
Every day's a chance for fun.
Side by side, we'll find our way,
Making memories every day.

Like a constellation shining bright,
You turn the darkness into light.
Every moment, every place,
Feels better with you, Grace.

Final Chorus

Grace, you're my constellation,
The heartbeat of this celebration.
Like a million stars in a summer sky,
You make my spirit fly.

Grace, you're my destination,
My reason for the jubilation.
Everywhere I go, I see your face,
And I can't help smiling, Grace.

Outro

Oh-oh-oh, shining bright tonight,
Oh-oh-oh, everything's alright.
Like a constellation in the sky above,
Grace, you're surrounded by love. ✨🎵

--------------------------------------------------------

Upbeat feel-good pop anthem, inspired by Pink's energetic and uplifting songs, female lead vocals, bright acoustic guitar, piano, hand claps, driving drums, catchy sing-along chorus, joyful harmonies, summer road trip atmosphere, positive energy, radio-friendly pop production, emotional but happy, soaring final chorus, crowd vocals in outro.

tracks.title: Grace in the Constellation
tracks.lyrics:
Title: "Grace in the Constellation"
(Inspired by the emotional honesty and duet-style storytelling of modern pop ballads, with an uplifting and heartfelt feel.)

--------------------------------------------------------

Verse 1
I remember all the nights we stayed awake,
Talking 'til the morning light began to break.
You were chasing dreams, I was searching too,
Somehow every road kept leading back to you.
You were the calm inside my restless mind,
The kind of soul that's impossible to find.
When the world felt heavy and out of place,
I found my strength in the light of Grace.
Pre-Chorus
Maybe we got lost in the noise and the doubt,
Maybe there were things we never figured out.
But every time I look into your eyes,
I see a future shining bright.
Chorus
Grace, you're my constellation,
Guiding me through every situation.
When the sky is dark and I lose my way,
You're the star that helps me find the day.
Grace, you're my inspiration,
More than a dream or imagination.
Through every season, every space,
I keep finding home in Grace.
Verse 2
We've both made mistakes, we've both been afraid,
Built a few walls and watched a few hearts break.
But every chapter, every twist in the story,
Somehow brought us closer to this moment of glory.
And if tomorrow changes all we know,
There's one thing I'm certain won't let go.
The bond we built, the memories we trace,
Will always carry the name of Grace.
Pre-Chorus
Maybe we're stronger than we ever believed,
Holding on to all the things we couldn't see.
And every time the world starts pulling apart,
You reconnect my heart.
Chorus
Grace, you're my constellation,
Guiding me through every situation.
When the sky is dark and I lose my way,
You're the star that helps me find the day.
Grace, you're my inspiration,
More than a dream or imagination.
Through every season, every space,
I keep finding home in Grace.
Bridge
And when the night feels endless,
When every answer seems so far away,
I'll look above the skyline,
And your light will lead the way.
Like a constellation painted in the sky,
A thousand reasons why I still try.
No matter where this life may take us,
Your light remains.
Final Chorus
Grace, you're my constellation,
My forever source of motivation.
When the world keeps changing pace,
I find my balance in your grace.
Grace, you're my inspiration,
The center of my navigation.
Through every season, every space,
I'll always find my way to Grace.
Outro
Under the stars tonight,
Your name shines in their embrace.
And every constellation reminds me...
Of Grace. 🎵
